---
title: "Research"
bibliography: publications.bib
csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
nocite: |
  @*
---

## Research areas

Innovation · Firm strategy · Organizational behavior · Labor demand and supply · Corporate finance · Globalization · Environmental economics.

## Publications

::: {#refs}
:::

## Working papers

- **The long-run impact of the internationalization of innovation on firm performance.** Single author, 2023. *(R&R, Applied Economics.)*
- **Innovating under uncertainty: From R&D financing to patent output.** With Vivek Ghosal, 2024. *(Under review.)*
- **Environmental regulation and horizontal mergers in the environmental industry.** Single author, 2023.
- **Regulatory constraints, innovation, and the determinants of recalls in the medical devices industry.** With Vivek Ghosal and D. Daniel Sokol, 2022.

## Work in progress

- **The impact of green innovation on firms' employment growth.** With Yuechao Ma.
- **The impact of green innovation on firms' financial performance: Evidence from the Green Credit policy as a quasi-natural experiment.** With Han Ou.

## Grants

- **The Multidimensional Effects and Mechanism Analysis of Corporate Green Innovation on the Enhancement of New Quality Productive Forces.** Faculty Research Grants, Macau University of Science and Technology. *Principal Investigator, 2024–2025.*
- **"Excellent Young Scholars" Program**, Hunan Provincial Department of Education. *Principal Investigator, 2024–2026.*
- **Economic Impact Analysis of GDOT's Short Line Railroads**, Georgia Department of Transportation. *Personnel, 2016–2018.*

## Professional service

- **Referee:** *Journal of International Financial Markets, Institutions & Money*; *Journal of Political Economy Microeconomics*; *China Economic Review*; *Journal of Management Science and Engineering*.
- **External reviewer:** Department of Education, Central University of Finance and Economics.
- **Conference organizing committee**, Xiangjiang Forum, 2022–2023.
- **Guest tutor**, USPTO Patent and Trademark Resource Center at Georgia Institute of Technology, February 2015.
